input.command: for id in 994 993 992 991 990 989 988 987 986 985; do f=_outputs/euler_solutions/p${id}.py; echo 'RUN' $f; timeout 60s python3 "$f" > "${f%.py}.out" 2>&1 || true; echo 'WROTE' "${f%.py}.out"; done
